label: Creep joiner rejection
description: Defines the action taken when the player rejects a creep joiner pawn. Inherits selection-weight and compatibility fields from CreepJoinerBaseDef.

hasLetter.label: Has letter
hasLetter.description: When true, a letter is sent to the player when the creep joiner is rejected. Requires letterLabel, letterDesc, and letterDef.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title of the letter sent when the creep joiner is rejected. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDesc.label: Letter description
letterDesc.description: Body text of the letter sent when the creep joiner is rejected. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the letter type (icon, sound, and pin behavior) used when the creep joiner is rejected.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: C# class deriving from BaseCreepJoinerWorker that executes this rejection action when triggered.
